---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <h1 class="hero-name">Dr. Cory William Dugan</h1>
    <p class="hero-credentials">PhD &nbsp;·&nbsp; AFHEA</p>
    <p class="hero-tagline">
      Academic researcher &amp; biostatistician specialising in iron deficiency,<br>
      women's health, and machine learning for clinical applications.
    </p>
    <div class="role-chips">
      <span class="role-chip">Research Officer · UWA</span>
      <span class="role-chip">MD Scholarly Activity Supervisor · UWA</span>
      <span class="role-chip">Co-founder · HolisticHer</span>
      <span class="role-chip">Adjunct Postdoctoral Fellow · Curtin University</span>
      <span class="role-chip">Adjunct Postdoctoral Fellow · Louisiana State University</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## About

My PhD and subsequent research have centred on iron deficiency in exercising females — a field defined by chronic underdiagnosis, male-calibrated reference ranges, and a near-total absence of large-scale intervention data.

I have screened over **3,000 females** for health indicators and markers of iron deficiency and anaemia, led the **IRONWOMAN double-blind randomised controlled trial**, and contributed to the Australian and New Zealand consensus position statement on iron in pregnancy. To date I have published **over 20 peer-reviewed articles** on women's health and related topics.

I am actively transitioning toward machine learning for health applications, combining formal R training (High Distinction, UWA), developing Python and PyTorch skills through the **AIM-AHEAD program**, and am currently enrolled in **Stanford's AI in Healthcare specialisation**.

---

## Research Focus

- **Iron deficiency & women's health** — biomarker modelling, sTfR/ferritin pipelines, reference-range critique
- **Clinical trials** — design, randomisation, IRONWOMAN RCT, longitudinal physiological data
- **ANZ consensus work** — iron supplementation in pregnancy position statement
- **Machine learning for health** — predictive modelling, feature selection, AI-assisted diagnostics

---

## Statistical Toolkit

```{=html}
<div class="toolkit-row">
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Linear Mixed-Effects Models</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Time-Series Analysis</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Meta-Analysis</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Survival Modelling</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">ROC Analysis</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">LASSO / Regularisation</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">R (tidyverse · ggplot2 · lme4)</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Python · PyTorch</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Stanford AI in Healthcare</span>
</div>
```

---

## Contact

```{=html}
<div class="contact-grid">
  <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:cory.dugan@uwa.edu.au">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> cory.dugan@uwa.edu.au
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:cory.dugan1@gmail.com">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> cory.dugan1@gmail.com
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/cory-dugan-phd/" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="tel:+61401910790">
    <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill"></i> 0401 910 790
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="https://calendly.com" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i> Book a 15-min call
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="/cv.html">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person-fill"></i> CV
  </a>
</div>
```
